title: System Entity
description: Immutable definition of what exists in the system registry, mapped by UID.

uid.description: The eternal essence identifier of the object.

type.description: Domain or classification type of the entity (e.g., document, component, system).

slug.description: Kebab-case string suitable for filenames or URLs.

aliases.description: Previous names or slugs maintained for historical search resolution.

heartbeats.description: Tripartite Convergence references establishing ultimate identity proof.

governance_locus.description: URI to the external tracking/adjudication platform (e.g. GitHub Issue).
